# Faktur API V2

> Faktur is a French invoicing SaaS. The V2 public API lets developers automate
> invoices, quotes, clients, products, and more.

Base URL: https://api.fakturapp.cc/api/v2
Authentication: Authorization: Bearer fk_live_<32 chars>
Versioning: URL path /api/v2/
Doc portal: https://developers.fakturapp.cc

## Key facts
- API requires team encryption mode = "standard". Private (E2E) teams cannot use the API.
- Scopes are formatted as resource:action (e.g. invoices:read).
- Wildcards: resource:* grants all actions on a resource, * grants everything.
- Response envelope: { "data": ... } on success, { "error": { "code", "message", ... } } on failure.
- Pagination is cursor-based: ?limit=50&cursor=…
- All POSTs accept Faktur-Idempotency-Key for replay safety (24h TTL).
- Rate limit: default 60 req/min, 1000 req/h. Headers X-RateLimit-Limit / -Remaining / -Reset.
- Webhooks: HMAC-SHA256 signed via X-Faktur-Signature: t=<unix>,v1=<hex>.

## Resources
- invoices, quotes, credit_notes, recurring_invoices
- clients (+ contacts), products, expenses
- reminders, payment_links, bank_accounts
- company, team, email, einvoicing, files, webhooks, ai

## Useful files
- /openapi.json — full OpenAPI 3.1 spec
- /quickstart — first-call guide
- /concepts/authentication — keys, scopes, errors
- /concepts/webhooks — signature verification
- /resources/<name> — endpoint reference per resource

## Common operations
- List invoices: GET /api/v2/invoices?limit=50&status=paid
- Create invoice: POST /api/v2/invoices { client_id, issue_date, due_date, lines: [...] }
- Send invoice: POST /api/v2/invoices/:id/send { to: [...], subject, body }
- Mark paid: POST /api/v2/invoices/:id/mark-paid { amount_cents, paid_at, payment_method }
- Submit to Chorus Pro: POST /api/v2/einvoicing/submit { invoice_id, target }

## Error codes
- 401 invalid_token, token_expired, token_revoked
- 403 insufficient_scope, ip_not_allowed, team_mode_private
- 404 resource_not_found
- 409 conflict, idempotency_replay
- 422 validation_failed, business_rule_violation
- 429 rate_limited, quota_exceeded
